candidate_summary: WEB-SPIRAL: orb-web-inspired sparse attention pattern — N radial anchor positions + M concentric spiral arcs, attention computed only at radial x spiral intersections.
rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7

rank_7_2604.13205.rationale: Direct match: orb-web-inspired radial+spiral intersection sparse attention; same metaphor and same mechanism.

rank_2_2506.19852.rationale: Radial Attention with energy decay — supplies the radial-anchor half of the pattern.

rank_8_2510.21430.rationale: Concentric Arc Sparse Attention — supplies the concentric-spiral half of the pattern.

rank_4_1904.10509.rationale: Sparse Transformer (strided+block) is the functional ancestor of all geometric sparse attention patterns.

rank_5_2004.05150.rationale: Longformer local-window+global is an adjacent sparse-attention cluster.

rank_6_2007.14062.rationale: BigBird random+window+global is an adjacent sparse-attention cluster.

rank_3_2511.10696.rationale: Pi-Attention periodic sparse — different geometry (periodic, not radial+spiral).

verifier_scores.note: Radial Attention directly implements the radial-anchor mechanism with energy decay; fully dominates the radial half.
Periodic sparse pattern; semantic threshold-edge hit, functional sub-threshold (different geometry).
Sparse Transformer; foundational strided+block sparse attention, threshold-edge functional hit.
Longformer local-window+global sparse pattern; threshold-edge functional hit.
BigBird random+window+global sparse pattern; threshold-edge functional hit.
Direct match: orb-web-inspired radial-spiral intersection sparse attention; identical metaphor and mechanism.
Concentric Arc Sparse Attention; fully dominates the spiral-arc half.

novelty_verdict.rationale: Rank 7 (2604.13205, Orb-Web-Inspired Radial-Spiral Sparse Attention) is a direct identity-collision — same biological metaphor and same radial+spiral intersection mechanism — by itself sufficient to reject. The candidate's two structural halves are separately dominated as well: Radial Attention (2506.19852) covers radial-anchor sparsity with energy decay, and Concentric Arc Sparse Attention (2510.21430) covers concentric-spiral-arc sparsity. Sparse Transformer, Longformer, and BigBird constitute additional adjacent prior art on geometric sparse-attention masks. The candidate offers no mechanism beyond a trivial union of disclosed components in a saturated subfield.

decision: REJECT (non-novel; 7/8 hits, 6 functional >=0.7 across 6 distinct clusters; direct prior-art identity match at rank 7)
